name: Frying Pan Beef-a-Roni
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan, brown the ground beef over medium heat until cooked through.
2. Add the chopped onion and cook until tender.
3. Stir in the onion soup mix, water, chili sauce, and thawed green beans. Bring to a boil.
4. Add the macaroni and stir well.
5. Reduce heat to low and cover. Cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring frequently.
